data.current_summary: Get the angle of the page / document / receipt
data.current_description: Analyzes a photo or image of a document and identifies the rotation angle of the page.
data.summary_suggestion: Detect and return document page rotation angle
data.description_suggestion: Analyzes a photo or image of a document to identify the rotation angle of the page. Returns the detected angle in degrees, which can be used to correct document orientation for subsequent OCR or preprocessing operations.
data.reasoning: Original summary uses slashes which is unclear for AI agents. Description lacks output details about what format the angle is returned in and how it can be used. data.current_summary: Convert a photo of a receipt into a CSV file containing structured information from the receipt
data.current_description: Leverage Deep Learning to automatically turn a photo of a receipt into a CSV file containing the structured information from the receipt.
data.summary_suggestion: Extract receipt data and convert to CSV format
data.description_suggestion: Uses Deep Learning-based receipt recognition to automatically extract structured information from a receipt photo, including line items, totals, dates, and merchant details. Returns the extracted data formatted as a CSV file suitable for accounting and expense management systems.
data.reasoning: Original summary is too long and not concise enough for AI agent interpretation. Description lacks specificity about what structured information is extracted and the practical use cases. Enhanced summary is more concise and action-oriented. Enhanced description specifies the types of data extracted (line items, totals, dates, merchant details), clarifies the output format, and provides context about use cases, improving AI agent interpretability.

message: Operation 'ImageOcr_ImageLinesWithLocation' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, missing_input_details, missing_output_details. Summary incorrectly states 'words' when operation extracts 'lines'. Description lacks clarity on what is returned (ImageToLinesWithLocationResult), input requirements, and confidence ratings. Added specific output schema reference and clarified use case distinction for AI agent decision-making.

data.current_summary: Convert a scanned image into words with location
data.current_description: Converts an uploaded image in common formats such as JPEG, PNG into lines/text with location information and other metdata via Optical Character Recognition.  This API is intended to be run on scanned documents.  If you want to OCR photos (e.g. taken with a smart phone camera), be sure to use the photo/toText API instead, as it is designed to unskew the image first.  Note: for free tier API keys, it is required to add a credit card to your account for security reasons, to use the free tier key with this API.
data.summary_suggestion: Extract text lines with location from scanned image
data.description_suggestion: Converts an uploaded image (JPEG, PNG) into recognized text lines with precise location coordinates and confidence ratings via Optical Character Recognition. Returns an ImageToLinesWithLocationResult containing extracted lines with bounding box information. Designed for scanned documents; for smartphone photos, use the photo/toText API which includes image unskewing. Note: Free tier API keys require a credit card on file for security purposes.
data.reasoning: Summary incorrectly states 'words' when operation extracts 'lines'. Description lacks clarity on what is returned (ImageToLinesWithLocationResult), input requirements, and confidence ratings. Added specific output schema reference and clarified use case distinction for AI agent decision-making.

data.current_summary: Returns the result of the Async Job - possible states can be STARTED or COMPLETED
data.summary_suggestion: Retrieve asynchronous OCR job status and results
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves the status and results of an asynchronous PDF OCR processing job. Accepts a job ID parameter and returns the current job state (STARTED or COMPLETED) along with results when available. Use this operation to poll for completion of long-running PDF OCR operations initiated by async endpoints.

Note: for free tier API keys, it is required to add a credit card to your account for security reasons, to use the free tier key with this API.

data.current_summary: Convert a photo of a document or receipt into words with location
data.current_description: Converts a photo of a document or receipt in common formats such as JPEG, PNG into words/text with location information and other metdata via Optical Character Recognition.  This API is intended to be run on photographs of documents.  If you want to OCR scanned documents (e.g. taken with a scanner), be sure to use the image/toText API instead, as it is designed for that use case.  Note: for free tier API keys, it is required to add a credit card to your account for security reasons, to use the free tier key with this API.
data.description_suggestion: Converts a photo of a document or receipt in common formats (JPEG, PNG) into words/text with location information and metadata via Optical Character Recognition. Returns a PhotoToWordsWithLocationResult containing recognized words, their positions, and confidence ratings. This operation is optimized for photographs of documents taken with smartphones or cameras. For scanned documents from scanners, use the image/toText API instead. Note: Free tier API keys require a credit card on file for security purposes to use this operation.
